Also beware if you rent or buy a movie from Prime or any other subscription linked to your account it will also take  from the gc first. My niece hadn't used the card yet so it deducted from her gift card. Which I had to reload it today. But the GC process was very easy to buy from my account and loved that I could easily get any denomination.

rating 5.0. Great gifting flexibility with an included free birthday tin card holder These gift card tins are great. The birthday cupcake tin with a padded interior for the card is a nice little extra to affix to a birthday card and does not increase the cost of the gift card. Also, there is flexibility in gifting denomination as the giver can choose whatever amount they wish to gift; the only downside is that the actual physical gift card will not display the amount if you choose something other than the standard $10, $25, $50 denominations.
Couple the one-day shipping with the fact that these gift cards can be put toward just about anything the recipient could possibly want and these are a great option for a last minute gift or a gift for someone who is difficult to shop for.

Great graduation gift for those not sure what the new graduate wants. Better than gifting money since you know where they'll be spending it

The first restaurant took it, no problems, gas station took it but a different restaurant and one store wouldn’t accept it. It says you can use it anywhere visa is accepted but I didn’t find that to be true.

I have emailed, chatted and spoken with CSR, Leadership Team, Supervisors, Gift Card Det and Card Issuer complete run around. Have been told I would have Amazon credit...
